title: How to Respond to a 1-Star Google Review About Rude Staff
description: Don't panic! Here are 3 proven templates to handle a 1-star Google review about rude waitstaff and protect your restaurant's reputation.
bad_example: We don't have rude staff, the customer is lying.
good_example: Thank you for your feedback. We are so sorry to hear about your experience. Hospitality is our core value, and we are addressing this with our front-of-house team immediately...
